description_long: This is a rectangular, flexible sachet package labeled 'Faragello Peach Flavor' with vibrant green as the dominant background color. The front features a realistic image of a ripe peach and a peach slice, along with bold red and white branding and nutritional highlights, including a Vitamin C badge. The back of the package is densely covered with nutritional information, ingredients, barcode, and recycling symbols, all printed in white and yellow text. The sides of the package are extremely thin, indicating a flat, single-use packet likely made of laminated plastic or foil. The overall appearance is glossy and smooth, with no visible openings or interactive parts. The package is designed to make one liter of peach-flavored drink, as indicated on the front.
description: A glossy, green rectangular sachet labeled 'Faragello Peach Flavor' with a realistic peach image and detailed nutritional info on the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the colorful branding, peach imagery, and product information prominently.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the sachet's extreme thinness, with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: The back view displays dense nutritional information, ingredients, barcode, and recycling symbols.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again highlights the flat, thin profile of the sachet.
